C-LINES International is a French engineering company and a leading provider in the prefabricated buildings for the agri-food and livestock’s sector, with over 5 million square meters built in more than 60 countries.The C-LINES concept is based on an advanced structural engineering process and a comprehensive 3D building modeling approach. Our mission is to deliver reliable and customizable structures that meet the specific needs of our clients while ensuring the welfare of the animals. We design and produce livestock buildings for all turnkey solutions: such as hatcheries, breeders, broilers, layer houses, warehouses, processing houses, packing station and all types of industrial buildings.Livestock building: With a focus on the broiler industry, egg layers, swine, and other animal rearing sectors, we offer innovative solutions that combine quality, durability, and efficiency.Hatcheries: C-Lines International designs and constructs hatcheries for the poultry industry. Our hatchery buildings are equipped with state-of-the-art incubation systems, climate control, and biosecurity measures to ensure optimal conditions for the successful hatching and rearing of chicks.Slaughterhouses: We provide specialized buildings for the efficient and hygienic processing of livestock. Our slaughterhouse structures are designed to meet industry regulations, incorporating features such as temperature control, sanitary facilities, and optimized workflow.Cold Rooms and Storage Facilities: C-Lines International offers custom-designed cold rooms and storage facilities for the agri-food industry. These structures are equipped with temperature control systems, insulation, and efficient storage solutions to preserve the quality and freshness of perishable goods.

The National Grain Supply Company, "SABIL" is a SALIC Group subsidiary wholly owned by the Public Investment Fund (PIF). The resolution also transferred the operational responsibilities of grain silos, including wheat procurement and strategic storage, from the Authority to SALIC.SABIL will oversee the operational management of grain facilities across all silo branches in various regions of Saudi Arabia. It will maintain the required strategic reserves in alignment with Saudi food security requirements. Furthermore, SABIL aims to enhance operational efficiency, enabling local farmers and milling companies to ensure sustainable supply chains.

Saudi Aquaculture Society has been incorporated by virtue of a resolution issued by Saudi Council of Ministers on 14.03.1434 AH, corresponding to 06.02.2012 AD as a national society of an artificial personality and independent financial liability. It works under supervision of Ministry of Agriculture and it's headquarter is Jeddah. VisionContribute to the development of a sustainable and competitive global aquaculture industry in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, capable of providing safe and high-quality products with competitive prices and produced by environmentally responsible procedures and generating a profitable return on investment. MissionWork to enhance the role of sustainable aquaculture industry as one of the main elements in the development of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and to contribute substantially to the national economy and employment, and create investment opportunities by adopting environmentally sound methods consistent with the laws and regulation in force.To achieve its objectives, Saudi Aquaculture Society will perform the following tasks: Work together with the Management of Fisherise Affairs to achieve the following tasks a) Participate in the preparations of the requirements and standards necessary to be applied to the aquaculture industry and its products.b) Study the rules, regulations and standards related to the aquaculture industry and recommend any amendments on them.c) Propose mechanisms for surveillance and inspection.d) Recommend granting licenses and permits, amend or withdraw them.e) Propose areas of research and studies related to aquaculture and its products and their marketing.f) Study the constraints facing the aquaculture industry and recommend whatever feasible to facilitate the industry affairs.g) Hold conferences, symposia and exhibitions on the aquaculture industry and participate in them both inside and outside the Kingdom.h) Represent members of SAS with the official bodies and Professional scientific and business institutions inside and Outside the Kingdom.i) Grant a logo stating that the facility is applying appropriate aquaculture production standards according to the international standards and norms. Coordinate with the relevant authorities to achieve the Following tasks a) Provide technical advice in its field of competence and increase SAS resources to higher levels.b) Work with the private and public sectors on the development of investments and pilot projects in the area of aquaculture.c) Strengthen relationships and incorporate the principle of shared benefits and the exchange of professional experiences among its members and relevant private companies, institutions, scientists and experts from home and abroad.d) Contribute to the provision of assistance to small and medium size enterprises and entrepreneurs in the area of aquaculture.e) Follow-up and evaluate new developments and requirements of practical application, and prepare appropriate amendments to improve the level of performance.f) Take advantage of using the website and various media in communication, awareness and education.

details: Shandong HYRT Water-Saving Irrigation Co., Ltd., was established in 2014, is a professional manufacturer of irrigation products. We are engaged in the research, development, production, sale and service of drip tape, plastic pipes and fittings, sprinklers, drippers, layflat hose, filters, rain spray hose and all kinds of valves etc. We are located in Laiwu district Jinan city with very convenient transport 200km near Qingdao seaport. Professional and experienced sales team; advanced production machines and strict quality control are our greatest advantages. We can communicate with customers freely in English and we can offer plan design with the most suitable farmland irrigation plan basing your real situation. We have many patents including the new anti-inverted siphon pressure compensation dripper, low-speed rotating sprinkler, two-way flow channel on line dripper, pressure flow regulating valve, and others. Our products are well accepted by all our customers in and out abroad. Our market covers all over the world including Africa, Mid East, South Asia, North and South America, Europe and Oceania. Our company also has a dedicated R&D and quality inspection team with ISO9001 management committed to creating high-quality products.

We are pleased to introduce Square Root Maritime Co., a leading maritime shipping agency based in Saudi Arabia. We deliver professional, reliable services to support all stakeholders in cargo import and export operations, adhering strictly to international industry standards for seamless cargo handling.As one of the select few agencies with offices in every major seaport across the Kingdom, our committed team operates 24/7 to ensure operational excellence and tailored solutions for both local and international clients.Square Root Maritime offers an extensive array of marine-related services, with particular dominance in managing bulk grain shipments. Our expertise spans a variety of cargos, including wheat, corn, soybeans, soybean meal, wheat bran, DDGS, and barley. We also specialize in the storage, transportation and distribution of grain cargo on behalf of suppliers and buyers. Uniquely, Square Root Maritime is the only agency that owns and operates its own grain storage facilities in the Eastern and Western regions of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

details: Vifra S.r.l., headquartered in Aprilia (Italy), is a specialized manufacturer of advanced climate control and water treatment solutions. The company designs and produces high-pressure fog systems, dehumidification systems, as well as reverse osmosis and ultrafiltration technologies, entirely within its own Italian facility. With a strong commitment to quality and innovation, Vifra delivers fully “Made in Italy” systems that ensure efficiency, reliability, and long service life. Their tailor-made approach allows them to provide customized solutions for sectors such as agriculture, industry, and environmental management, optimizing humidity regulation, water purity, and overall process performance. From design and engineering to production, installation, and after-sales support, Vifra offers a complete service cycle, guaranteeing technical excellence and customer satisfaction.
